Assembly macros, system call functions, C library functions, and custom printf for JerryScript.

## Folders
- **[arch](arch/README.md)**: Assembly macros for ARMv7, x86-32, and x86-64 architectures for system calls and context operations.
- **[include](include/README.md)**: Defines structures for time and timezones, custom assert macros, and standard C library headers.
- **[target](target/README.md)**: Assembly macros, system call functions, and POSIX platform-specific functions for Jerry libc.

## Files
- **[jerry-libc-defs.h](jerry-libc-defs.h.md)**: Defines attribute macros for unused, used, noreturn, and noinline in C.
- **[jerry-libc-printf.c](jerry-libc-printf.c.md)**: Implements a custom printf function for formatted output in the JerryScript library.
- **[jerry-libc.c](jerry-libc.c.md)**: Implementation of common C library functions and a pseudo-random number generator for JerryScript.
